---
title: "MotoGP Dissertation"
author: "Camilla Piccione"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(hyper2)
library("magrittr")
```

## MotoGP



```{r cars}
MotoGP2023 <- read.delim("C:/Users/User/Desktop/Tesi master/MotoGP2023.txt")
head( MotoGP2023)

MotoGP2024 <- read.delim("C:/Users/User/Desktop/Tesi master/MotoGP2024.txt")

MotoGP2025 <- read.delim("C:/Users/User/Desktop/Tesi master/MotoGP2025.txt")
```



```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}


```

```{r cars1}
sprint_cols <- grep("^S\\.", names(MotoGP2025), value = TRUE)


```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
